generated_oml:
instance PhysicalTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle based on a Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium teleoperated vehicle, retrofitted with NVIDIA Jetson NX and Jetson Orin Nano microcomputers, Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR, Intel D435i Depth Camera, and Vedder Electronic Speed Controller"
]

instance HokuyoUST10LXLidar : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoLidarDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i Depth Camera for depth perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle state sensor measuring speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle state sensor measuring steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance HokuyoLidarDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLidar
]

instance DepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance VehicleSteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSteeringAngleSensor
]

instance HokuyoLidarData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoLidarDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw depth perception data from Intel D435i Depth Camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance VehicleSteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw vehicle steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed object track data stored in SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoLidarDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering algorithm for point cloud data processing"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance ISO15622ACCAccelerationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant ACC control model for vehicle acceleration"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ISO23247ReferenceArchitecture : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for digital twin development"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-process communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting and data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for performance-critical components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing and object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for vehicle state and object track data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time vehicle state visualization, object tracking reports, and performance analytics"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVehicleStateVisualization, ObjectTrackingReport, PerformanceAnalytics
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for offloading ACC system computation to the Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides AutomaticACCCommandAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for UI-based control of ACC functions"
    DTDFVocab:provides ManualACCCommandAction
]

instance RealTimeVehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle speed, steering angle, and sensor data"
]

instance ObjectTrackingReport : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Object tracking reports generated from DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering"
]

instance PerformanceAnalytics : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance analytics for driver information"
]

instance AutomaticACCCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic ACC command execution for vehicle control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ManualACCCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual ACC command execution via UI for vehicle control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor actuation and speed control"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo for directional control"
]

instance VehicleSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwin, HokuyoUST10LXLidar, IntelD435iDepthCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, VehicleSteeringAngleSensor, VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServo, NVIDIAJetpack50SDK, ROS2Middleware, Python38, CPlusPlus, MATLABSimulink, SQLDatabase, DBSCANModel, KalmanFilterModel, ISO15622ACCAccelerationModel, ISO23247ReferenceArchitecture, DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals for ACC commands (enable/disable, desired speed, emergency braking) transmitted from DT to PT, converting to motor voltage commands and steering adjustments via actuators."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with end-to-end latency ≤100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms as per requirements R7 and R8."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entity-based architecture with Physical Twin Entity (on vehicle hardware), Digital Twin Entity (cloud/hosted), User Entity (remote UI), and Cross-System Entity (Data Translation), communicating via ROS2 intra-entity and Wi-Fi inter-entity."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Used during design (development phase for ADAS systems) and operation (real-time monitoring and control of ACC during vehicle operation)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Adherence to ISO 15622 for ACC control strategy, meeting latency (≤100 ms) and clock sync (100 ms) requirements for safety-critical operations; specific V&V methods not detailed beyond requirements compliance."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 for intra-entity communication within the vehicle, Wi-Fi network for inter-entity communication; Data Translation FE implements serialization and protocol conversion (potentially OPC UA as per ISO 23247 standard)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on NVIDIA Jetson hardware onboard the vehicle; Digital Twin Entity components deployed on cloud infrastructure; User Entity hosted on remote client devices for UI access."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework reference architecture applied to automotive systems; ACC implementation follows ISO 15622."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety considerations enforced via strict latency and synchronization requirements; cybersecurity measures not explicitly detailed in the document."
]
